title: LIVE! Economic Empowerment Through Digital Skills
excerpt: Exploring how digital literacy programs drive economic opportunity across Africa
content:
Digital literacy has become one of the most reliable pathways to economic opportunity across Africa. From remote work to digital entrepreneurship, the skills gap is the single biggest barrier between talented young people and the global economy.

There are 3 places to get information from

  1. The company

  2. Others

  3. The internet
author: Tope Alabi
